arts.ttl: Marca share Real Madrid team choices and plans for Arsenal match
arts.sum: Arsenal take on Real Madrid in a massive Champions League quarter-final first leg tie later today. The Gunners will come into the game on the back of a 1-1 draw against Everton and Real Madrid picked up a 2-1 loss to Valencia at the weekend. arts.sum: Buakyo Saka has fired back at claims that he still has more work to do to reach the level of Real Madrid pair Kylian Mbappe and Vinicius Junior.

arts.ttl: Man City ROCKED as Erling Haaland asks to LEAVE
arts.sum: If Man City receive a heavy points penalty - which potentially could even be relegation - in their much-publicised trial, then it is already widely expected that Haaland will probably leave. Erling Haaland is unhappy and ready to quit Man City this summer, according to reports in the Spanish media.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal showing interest in winger dubbed ‘one of the best in the world’
arts.sum: Arsenal are looking to strengthen their wide attacking options in the summer transfer window. They currently have three wide attackers in their squad: Bukayo Saka, Gabriel Martinelli and Leandro Trossard. The depth in his position is weak and Mikel Arteta is keen on addressing it after this season. arts.ttl: 'Make a huge difference' - Mikel Arteta issues rallying cry to Arsenal fans
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has a message for Arsenal's supporters about the role they can play during the Champions League quarter-final first leg tie with Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Mikel Arteta's side 'receive latest update' on Leroy Sane's Bayern Munich contract talks
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly suffer a blow in their pursuit of Bayern Munich winger Leroy Sane this summer.

arts.ttl: Former Liverpool and Arsenal star survives terrifying grenade attack in Israel
arts.sum: Yossi Benayoun, who played in the Premier League from 2005 to 2014, was at home with his family in Israel when a grenade was launched through their door and caused an explosion
